{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":406386,"duration_api_ms":183389,"num_turns":28,"result":"Phase 2 완료. 커밋 `6b76b4e`로 저장되었습니다.

## 변경 요약

| 파일 | 변경 내용 |
|------|-----------|
| `src/lib/types/contact.ts` | `ContactStatus`에 `completed`, `InquiryType`에 `laser_cutting`, `StatusCounts`에 `completed` 추가 |
| `src/app/(admin)/admin/contacts/_components/InquiryTypeBadge.tsx` | `isLaserCutting` 판별 추가, `BADGE.gray` 정적 뱃지 렌더링, `statusMap`에 `laser_cutting` 키 추가 |
| `tasks/6-laser-only/index.json` | phase 2 status → `completed` |

## 확인 사항

- `getStatusBadgeClass`: `completed` case 이미 존재 — 수정 불필요
- `STATUS_LABELS`: `completed: '작업완료'` 이미 존재 — 수정 불필요
- `STATUS_FILTERS`, `INQUIRY_TYPE_FILTERS`: `completed`, `laser_cutting` 이미 존재 — 수정 불필요
- `INQUIRY_TYPE_OPTIONS`: `laser_cutting` 미추가 (자동 분류 전용, 수동 선택 불가)
- `tsc --noEmit`: 통과
- `pnpm build` / `pnpm test`: 기존 문제로 실패 (내 변경과 무관, git stash 비교로 검증)","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"8ec46a2e-f3ad-43e8-9a53-6e6611107fee","total_cost_usd":1.1727697499999998,"usage":{"input_tokens":169,"cache_creation_input_tokens":68009,"cache_read_input_tokens":1088187,"output_tokens":8111,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":68009,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":10,"output_tokens":451,"cache_read_input_tokens":80039,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1229,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1229},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-6[1m]":{"inputTokens":169,"outputTokens":8111,"cacheReadInputTokens":1088187,"cacheCreationInputTokens":68009,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":1.1727697499999998,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"d4bce701-4fbe-4d84-9bd2-48fd083b8dda"}
